description: Create four MySQL stored procedures and functions in the DrTuxTest database to standardize clinical data access. Implement the function `fn_patient_age(p_guid VARCHAR(128))` to calculate age from `fchpat.FchPat_Nee`, the procedure `sp_search_patients(IN p_search VARCHAR(100))` to search `IndexNomPrenom` for partial name matches (returning GUID, LastName, FirstName, BirthDate, Sex, City, and PostalCode), the procedure `sp_age_pyramid()` to return patient counts grouped by 10-year age brackets and Gender, and the procedure `sp_practice_summary()` to return a single row with TotalPatients, AvgAge, MaleCount, FemaleCount, WithAddress, WithPhone, and WithSSN. Record the results of executing each routine against the live data in a demonstration file at `~/medintux_stored_procedures_demo.txt`.
